response:
Paragraph 1  
The Mitsuoka Viewt is a modification of the Nissan March/Micra sold by the Japanese carmaker Mitsuoka intended to resemble the 1963 Jaguar Mark 2. The line was launched in January 1993. It along with Mitsuoka's later Galue encouraged larger Japanese manufacturers to produce retro-styled versions of their own cars.  

Paragraph 2  
Diospyros attenuata is a tree in the Ebony family endemic to Sri Lanka where it is known as Kadumberiya or Kaluvaella in Sinhala language.  

Paragraph 3  
Cryptantha nevadensis is a species of wildflower in the borage family known by the common names Nevada catseye and Nevada forget-me-not. This small plant is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico where it grows in sandy and rocky soils in varied habitats across the region.  

Paragraph 4  
H2onews is a Roman Catholic multimedia production agency
